Home.name: Tran Van Thuyen
Home.testimonialsTitle: Some words from past employers and partners
Home.testimonialCosden: I worked with Thuyen on an educational platform for Cosden Solutions for a couple of months. I can say that Thuyen is a great developer with a lot of potential. He is very thorough, learns quickly, and produces very good work. I have given him tough challenges to face, some even beyond his current skillset, and he has risen to face those challenges and succeeded every time. Working with Thuyen is really easy. He is great at communication, will reach out when needed, and won't waste anyone's time. He is independent, and can handle tough problems and find solutions to them. He is also a great learner, which will make a very good investment as a developer. I'm sure he will grow and achieve great things. I would absolutely recommend Thuyen for any developer position as I genuinely think he will be an incredibly valuable resource!

Home.aboutBackground: My interest in web technology began when I first used a computer in high school. Since then, I started learning on my own and decided to pursue software engineering as my major.
